---
format:
  html:
    title-block: false
resources:
  - "files/RAH_Profile_Photo.jpg"
---

```{=html}
<div style="text-align:center; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
  <img
    src="files/RAH_Profile_Photo.jpg"
    alt="R. Abraham Holland"
    style="width:200px; /* no border-radius, so it stays square */ margin-bottom:0.5rem;"
  />
  <h1>R. Abraham Holland</h1>
  <div class="lead text-center">
    <strong>Economist, Cost Analysis and Research Division</strong><br/>
    <strong>Institute for Defense Analyses</strong><br/>
    National Security · Resource Allocation · Strategic Uncertainty
  </div>
  <a class="btn btn-outline-primary" href="files/Abraham_Holland_CV.pdf">
    Download CV (PDF)
  </a>
</div>

```
